chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-448 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on MA No.12073/2022. 3. For orders as to non- prosecution on MA No.12074/2022 & 7880/2022 as notice not issued as cost and copies not supplied. 4. For order on MA No.7881/2022. 5. For order on MA No.10150/2022. 6. For hearing of MA No.10166/2022. 7. For hearing of MA No.2306/2021. 8. For hearing of main case. 29-11-2022 Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio advocate for petitioners. Mr. Aghis-u-Salam Tahirzada advocate for respondent No.11. Mr. Sundar Das advocate for intervener(s). Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Israr Ahmed Mahesar Inharge Litigation Branch, Director Settlement Survey & Land Records Sindh, Hyderabad and SIP Sajidullah Ghambhir on behalf of SSP Jamshoro. In compliance of last order whereby Director Settlement Survey & Land Records was directed to appoint a team for field survey of Survey Nos.302 & 303, the report has been submitted by Litigation Incharge, Settlement Survey, duly signed by the relevant officials, stating that Survey No.302 is owned by private persons. But Survey No.303 is government land admeasuring 01.10 acre out of which 14 ghunta have been encroached by different people and they have constructed houses over there. 02 ghunta has been occupied by Imam Bargah, whereas 05 ghunta has been used in road, the owner of Survey No.302 has occupied 04 ghunta. Thus, total 25 ghunta of the government land has been consumed and occupied as defined above. The report is taken on record. Learned A.A.G. Sindh has submitted that since the government land has been occupied, necessary direction be issued to the Revenue Department to clear the same after issuing notices to the people who have constructed their houses to vacate the same within a certain

Learned A.A.G. Sindh has submitted that since the government land has been occupied, necessary direction be issued to the Revenue Department to clear the same after issuing notices to the people who have constructed their houses to vacate the same within a certain 2 period. Order accordingly. Let the entire land as noted above in Survey No.303 belonging to the government be vacated within a period of two months in the light of report and sketch. This petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
